description_long: This object is a small, cylindrical plastic medicine bottle with a white screw-on cap. The bottle features a printed label with Russian text, including a bolded section and a yellow horizontal stripe near the top. The label wraps around the bottle, with the main product information visible on the front and additional details on the sides. The cap is ribbed for grip and slightly wider than the bottle's neck, indicating it can be twisted open. The bottle appears opaque, likely to protect its contents from light. The overall appearance suggests it is designed for storing tablets or capsules, commonly found in pharmacies or healthcare settings.
description: A small, opaque white plastic medicine bottle with a ribbed screw cap and a printed label featuring Russian text and a yellow stripe.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main label with Russian text and a yellow stripe, as well as the ribbed white cap.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the curvature of the bottle and the continuation of the label, with less readable text.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain white back of the bottle with minimal visible label details.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the label's edge and the bottle's cylindrical shape.
attribute_label_text: ГИАЛУРОНОВАЯ КИСЛОТА, С ГЛЮКОЗОЙ [illegible] 60 таблеток [illegible] 500 мг + 677 мг
